phase_1_rationale: Candidate B is better factored, extracting the repetitive flag normalization logic into `normalizeDuplicateReason` and combining the unsupported feature detection checks cleanly. Candidate B also preserves the precompiled regex in `api.go` rather than degrading it to a runtime check like Candidate A.

phase_1_semantic_concerns.A: Candidate A degrades performance by replacing a precompiled regex in `api.go` with `regexp.MatchString`. It also duplicates the flag normalization logic in two places.
